statement.title: Statement
statement.content:
Description
![](https://cdn.luogu.com.cn/upload/vjudge_pic/CF2214A/1451a22dc8cf1f0ecf36bac2514465bf41c9fc7d56b28085b234d8e3bf8370dc.png)

Output Format
Output exactly two characters: a single letter followed by a single digit, with no spaces or additional characters between them.

solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
You just need to output the arrow that only appears once. That arrow is
C2
.
